title: Guide to Strings in Python

summary: A string in Python is a sequence of characters. These characters can be letters, numbers, symbols, or whitespace, and they are enclosed within quotes. title: Guide to Heaps in Python
author: Dimitrije Stamenic
summary: Explore the intricacies of heaps, a tree-based data structure adept at maintaining order and hierarchy. Learn how heaps stand out in the world of data structures and their seamless integration in Python.
